sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92696" key="r(oo/kokka" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥοόκοκκα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n92696.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pomegranate seeds</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:222D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.222D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
